name: CLEO.COM
message: [AI generated] CLEO.COM is a fintech startup that offers an AI-driven budget assistant to help individuals manage their finances. Its primary service enables budgeting, saving, and tracking spendings in an innovative way. Geared towards millennials, Cleo provides insights into spending habits, gives financial advice, and allows for easy management of money across multiple accounts. It operates in the UK and the US.
